wins.event: Q1 revenue $19.3B record (+29% YoY); EBITDA $13.1B record (68% margin)
AI revenue $8.4B (+106% YoY); custom AI accelerators +140% YoY; Q2 AI guide $10.7B (+140% YoY)
Q2 total guide $22B (+47% YoY) — sharp acceleration; EBITDA 68%
OpenAI added as 6th XPU customer (>1GW deploying 2027); Anthropic >3GW in 2027 (vs 1GW 2026)
2027 AI chip revenue line-of-sight >$100B (vs $20B in FY 2025)

risks.event: Customer concentration: 6 XPU customers, but a few mega-customers dominate
Massive 2027 ramp creates execution risk on supply chain and capacity
Non-AI semi flat QoQ; only modest 4% YoY growth in Q2 guide

guidance.notes: Q2 2026 guide $22B (+47% YoY); AI 2027 chip revenue line-of-sight >$100B. Capacity for 2026-2028 fully secured. New 6th XPU customer (OpenAI). Anthropic ramp 3x YoY.

_notes: OpenAI customer addition is the headline. 2027 line-of-sight to >$100B AI chip revenue (vs $20B FY 2025 = 5x in 2 years). CEO at peak conviction. Backlog visibility through 2028.
